content.en:
Lord Wuheng was in a very bad mood, and the last thing he wanted was for the Endless Lord to break through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord

Endless Lord Ye Tian has created a top-notch supreme technique at the Legendary Realm Lord level, and once such a demon breaks through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, he may soon surpass him

He hoped that Ye Tian would stay in the Legendary Realm Lord Realm forever and would not be able to break through, but this was unlikely.

However, he didn't expect Ye Tian to break through so quickly, and the speed of this breakthrough was too fast.

According to his understanding, it wasn't a long time since Ye Tian became the Lord of the Legendary Realm!

"Hmph, even if you become a peak Legendary Realm Lord, it is not easy to progress at the Peak Legendary Realm Lord level, maybe the Endless Lord will become mediocre after becoming a Peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

Lord Wuheng thought.

He didn't stop Ye Tian from breaking through, because even if he stopped it this time, he couldn't stop it next time.

In the Void Region, there is not yet a peak Legendary Realm Lord who has failed to break through, so if it is stopped this time, it will be completely torn apart.

When the time comes, if the two peak Legendary Realm Lords of the True Immortal Holy Land deal with him together, he is not afraid, but the Immortal Holy Land will not be able to bear it.

......

Kukai.

Ye Tian broke through here, and no one came to stop him.

Soon, he faced a critical moment.

H-167!!

In an instant, Ye Tian turned into a space incarnation, completely becoming one with space.

His body continued to absorb Kukai's origin power, and his strength continued to skyrocket.

"Finally broke through, Peak Legendary Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and then looked at the world in front of him, as if it had completely changed.

As if there were no more secrets between heaven and earth, his gaze could instantly penetrate any part of the Void Zone, and with a single finger, he could crush a Legendary Realm Lord in a distant region.

Distance was no longer a problem for him, not even time.

This is the strength and realm of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord!

Having reached this realm, he already belongs to the top group except for the mysterious and eternal master.

Of course, in this handful, he is not the most powerful, and there are still many who are stronger than him.

For example, the white-bearded old man, the strength of the white-bearded old man is afraid that it is extremely powerful among the peak legend realm lords, and it is not comparable to the ordinary peak legend lord.

Therefore, the white-bearded old man could not give face to any peak Legendary Realm lord, and he could have no scruples.

"Endless Lord, congratulations on your breakthrough to the peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"Endless Lord, congratulations on your breakthrough to the peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"Endless Lord, congratulations on your breakthrough to the peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

One by one of the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land congratulated.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, everyone left Kukai and returned to the True Absence Holy Land.

After returning, Ye Tian first held a celebratory feast, and many Legendary Realm Lords came to congratulate him.

After the feast, Ye Tian announced a retreat to stabilize the realm.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian annihilated a duplicate body, and then re-copied it, easily turning all of his duplicated bodies into peak Legendary Realm Lords.

And the other peak Legendary Realm lords would take a long time and countless resources just to raise their clones to the peak Legendary Realm lord level, and the price Ye Tian paid was very low.

After a period of time, Ye Tian can be regarded as completely stabilizing the realm, and the body of the peak Legendary Realm Lord can be regarded as completely running in and fusing with space and time.

With his current peak Legendary Realm Lord's realm, he has mastered two top-notch supreme techniques, and the supreme legendary body has reached the Dacheng realm, and his will has also reached the seventh-order peak realm, and his strength is already very strong, surpassing the peak Legendary Realm lord like the Wuheng Lord.

"It's a pity that the Eternal Will has not broken through to the Eighth Order, no wonder the Eighth Order is called the Eternal Master's Will Realm, and it is difficult for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord to raise his will to the Eighth Order. However, there is still a gap between the seventh-order peak and the seventh-order peak.I can feel that my will has improved a lot.And I can continue to improve, but if I can't achieve the qualitative change of will, then it is not an eighth-order will. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He was a little curious, had the old man's will reached the eighth order?

However, he felt that the eighth-order Eternal Will should be a qualitative change, and once he broke through to the eighth-order Eternal Will, he was afraid that there would be an astonishing increase in strength.

this day.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Dark Word discussed the cultivation of the peak Legendary Realm Lord level and discussed the experience.

After all, the gap between the Peak Legendary Realm Lord and the Eternal Master is too large, so the amount of improvement that can be made is also very large.

The two kept discussing.

The Lord of Darkness said: "I have discussed with some peak Legendary Realm lords, the general peak Legendary Realm lord belongs to a very ordinary kind, and the weakest one belongs to a top supreme skill, but if he breaks through to the peak Legendary Realm lord level, after cultivating for a long time, he will more or less know a top supreme skill, just like the Lord of Wuheng, he will only have a top supreme skill, which belongs to the most ordinary level of the peak legend realm lord." Then he created a number of top supremes, and he had a certain attainment in the fusion of time and space, condensing the supreme body of time and space, this kind of peak legendary realm lord is basically not low, and he is stronger than ordinary peak legendary realm lords, just like the ice lord, he belongs to this level. "

"The peak Legendary Realm lords of the third level, they are quite accomplished in the fusion of time and space, and they have comprehended the supreme technique of time and space, which is the supreme skill of the supreme technology of billions of time and space supreme technology, that is, the power of time and space is perfectly fused together, and the terrifying power is exploded. "

"As for the peak Legendary Realm Lords of the fourth level, they have almost reached the peak level in terms of space-time fusion, and they can even attack the Eternal Master, but they dare not break through, because once they fail to break through, it will be the end of their fall. Such a peak legendary realm lord, the space-time supreme body has reached the peak realm, and he will have a variety of space-time supreme skills. "

"There is also the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, whose will has reached the eighth order, and even created the space-time control technique, the space-time control technique is a skill that the eternal controller generally knows, but if the peak Legendary Realm Lord can also, plus the eighth-order will, it can be called the fifth level. "

"The Peak Legendary Realm Lords are roughly divided into these five levels, and I don't know if there are any Peak Legendary Realm Lords at the fifth level, but most of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords are at the first and second levels, and the Peak Legendary Realm Lords at the third level are extremely rare, and there are not a few. "

After the Lord of the Dark Words finished speaking, Ye Tian asked curiously, "What level does the white-bearded old man probably belong to, do you know?"

"I don't know. "

The Lord of the Word shook his head. _
